articles.title: Steve Jobs had a simple question he asked every job candidate and it had nothing to do with work
articles.description: Steve Jobs had a unique hiring approach known as the 'beer test'. He believed personality and the ability to connect were as crucial as skills. Jobs would gauge if he could comfortably have a casual conversation with a candidate. This instinct-driven method helped him find the right people for Apple. Other CEOs also employ personality assessments.

articles.title: BOJ's Himino calls for 'holistic approach' on global monetary system
articles.description: TOKYO, May 16 : Bank of Japan Deputy Governor Ryozo Himino on Saturday called for a "holistic approach" in designing the global future monetary system that does not confine options to central bank digital currencies and stablecoins.The U.S. prohibits the issuance of CBDCs and promotes stablecoins as a means t

articles.title: Rupee depreciation may erase gains from fuel price hike: SBI Report
articles.description: An SBI Research report says the Indian Rupee is at a critical level. Any further depreciation could completely offset the gains from the recent Rs 3 per litre fuel price hike, which was aimed at reducing massive losses for Oil Marketing Companies.

articles.title: Reliance Fraud: Custody of Jhunjhunwala, Bapna extended till May 29
articles.description: A Delhi court extended the judicial custody of former Reliance ADA Group executives Amitabh Jhunjhunwala and Amit Bapna until May 29 in a multi-crore money laundering case linked to alleged bank loan fraud at RHFL and RCFL.

articles.title: TCS CEO Salary: K Krithivasan Receives Rs 28.1 Crore in FY26, Up 6% From Previous Year
articles.description: TCS CEO K Krithivasan earns Rs 28.1 crore in FY26, up 5.95 percent, with Rs 25 crore commission; the CEO-to-employee median pay ratio stands at 332.8, median pay rises 5.1%.

articles.title: Green belts to green drains: Gurgaon’s new plan to tackle waterlogging this monsoon
articles.description: This is among several measures being taken across the city to ensure a hassle-free season for residents and commuters

articles.title: PM Narendra Modi participates in community programme in The Hague, Netherlands
articles.description: PM Narendra Modi participates in community programme in The Hague, Netherlands

articles.title: ‘We Can Afford It’: Techie Couple’s Rs 1.7 Crore Flat Dilemma Amid Layoffs Sparks Huge Debate
articles.description: A financially capable tech couple is hesitant to buy a ₹1.7 crore flat due to widespread IT layoffs and job uncertainty. Their dilemma, shared on Reddit, reflects a growing trend among Indian tech professionals who are reconsidering large, long-term home loans.

articles.title: Karnataka HC sets aside KIADB order on Embassy Developments’ Bengaluru land
articles.description: The company said the court order quashed the resumption proceedings, allowing Embassy East Business Park Limited to retain possession of the land. The parcel forms part of the company’s business park development plans in East Bengaluru.

articles.title: Chili’s CEO Kevin Hochman finds morning walks spark best ‘business ideas’; expert explains: ‘Early hours are distraction-free’
articles.description: Kevin Hochman starts his day by checking emails and then heads out for a 3.25-mile run before taking his dog for a walk.

articles.title: India-UAE Sign Major Energy Pact As UAE To Store 30 Million Barrels In India’s Strategic Oil Reserve
articles.description: India and the UAE have signed a major strategic energy agreement under which Abu Dhabi will store up to 30 million barrels of crude oil in India’s Strategic Petroleum Reserve. The announcement came after talks between Prime Minister Narendra Modi and UAE President Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan in Abu Dhabi. The two countries also discussed gas reserves, LPG supplies, defence cooperation and investments amid rising geopolitical tensions in West Asia.

articles.title: Nifty faces bearish grip: Key levels to watch and top 3 stock picks for next week
articles.description: Nifty faces bear control after a weekly slide. The IT sector is under pressure, and Kaynes stock has stumbled. Analysts highlight support at 23,500 for Nifty. Selective buying is advised in Marico, Arvind, and Triveni Turbine for the upcoming week. These stocks show potential for upside movement.

articles.title: After Rs 3 fuel hike, can petrol and diesel prices rise further? Experts decode
articles.description: After petrol and diesel prices were raised by around Rs 3 per litre across metros, concerns are growing over whether consumers could face another round of fuel hikes. Analysts say continued under-recoveries, elevated crude oil prices and government decisions could determine the next move.

articles.title: InvITs can eaise extra debt to fund capex, repairs
articles.description: In a significant regulatory shift, India's Securities and Exchange Board of India (Sebi) has unveiled new guidelines for Infrastructure Investment Trusts, or InvITs. These entities are now permitted to exceed the 49% debt cap of their asset value, unlocking a new avenue for funding vital capital projects and enhancements.

articles.title: PFRDA’s new NPS rules: Retirees can now withdraw up to 80% corpus after retirement
articles.description: The Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority issued a circular on May 15, 2026, formally launching the Retirement Income Scheme alongside several new post-retirement drawdown mechanisms.

articles.title: Sebi eases onboarding norms for foreign portfolio investors
articles.description: The Securities and Exchange Board of India has simplified rules for foreign investors. This eases the process of obtaining PAN cards for overseas portfolio investors. New rules introduced by the Income-tax Department had created difficulties. The Central Board of Direct Taxes has now issued relaxations. This aims to make onboarding smoother for foreign investors.

articles.title: Can homebuyers claim a brokerage refund after cancelling a flat booking? MahaRERA explains
articles.description: MahaRERA update: The Maharashtra real estate regulator has dismissed a complaint filed by two homebuyers seeking refund of brokerage paid for booking two flats

articles.title: India Builds 2,400-Crore-Litre Ethanol Capacity Amid Demand Gap
articles.description: The effective demand is only around 1100 crore litres, leading to underutilization of resources and allocation challenges, as only 60% of offered ethanol is absorbed.

articles.title: Fuel hike not enough to offset all losses, oil stocks fall further
articles.description: In an unexpected turn, shares of oil companies fell even with a recent fuel price boost. This adjustment couldn't compensate for the rising crude oil prices, leaving experts calling for further alterations in pricing. Investors are advised to hold tight until market indicators become more distinct. The persistent geopolitical climate is keeping oil prices robust, creating challenges for company profitability.

articles.title: From cost centre to strategic lever: The new workplace contract taking shape in India
articles.description: Companies are adopting flexible plans, preventive care, and digital delivery. This creates a new partnership between employers and employees, focusing on shared responsibility and smarter benefit design for a resilient workforce.

articles.title: Arohan Financial Services files IPO papers, plans Rs 600 crore fresh issue
articles.description: The IPO will comprise a fresh issue of shares worth Rs 600 crore, while existing investors plan to sell up to 40.4 million shares through an offer for sale.

articles.title: Chandigarh: Excise revenue crosses ₹965 crore; UT eyes ₹1,000 crore-plus target this year
articles.description: The department informed that for the 2026–27 policy year, 96 out of 97 retail liquor vends have been successfully allotted

articles.title: Europe lacks everything needed to make its stock market a winner
articles.description: European stocks have lost their momentum as investors shift focus from cheaper regional equities to the AI boom and seek refuge from a global energy shock. Europe's economic vulnerability to inflation and supply chain disruptions, coupled with a lack of AI-centric companies, has led to a significant underperformance compared to US and Asian markets.

articles.title: Essel Group’s Lower Parel corporate office up for auction with ₹650 crore reserve price
articles.description: Essel Group's Mumbai office is up for auction at ₹650 crore due to unpaid debts of over ₹696 crore, with symbolic possession taken by LIC Housing Finance.

articles.title: BMC set to privatise garbage management in city
articles.description: The private contractors will also have to manage the garbage collection from the community bins and litter bins in their demarcated areas with their own attendants. The city currently has 2,819 litter bins and 1,196 community collection spots in the city, which the contractors will have to maintain for a year, ensuring replacement of community bins when required

articles.title: Theatre Review: Letters give voice to two star-crossed lovers
articles.description: A tender and bittersweet exploration of love, friendship and missed chances, Love Letters traces five decades of emotional connection through the exchange of deeply personal letters

articles.title: Petrol, diesel price hike may trigger chain reaction across economy, say experts
articles.description: Rising petrol and diesel prices are poised to escalate India's retail inflation, with economists forecasting a significant ripple effect on household expenses. Analysts predict fuel price hikes could add 10-25 basis points to headline inflation, impacting transportation, logistics, and manufactured goods. This surge, coupled with increasing milk prices, is expected to strain consumer budgets further.

articles.title: Karnataka: KC valley project improved groundwater in Kolar & Chikkaballapura, says ex MP Rajeev Gowda
articles.description: 'KC valley project improved groundwater in Kolar, CB'Pur'

articles.title: Karnataka gig workers fear impact of petrol price hike as orders, income drop
articles.description: With petrol at Rs 106 per litre in Bengaluru, gig workers say delivery platforms must ensure transparency as fuel costs rise and orders decline affecting incomes of delivery agents across the city with demand fall sharply in recent weeks.

articles.title: Ackman, Loeb take different routes on tech bets in early 2026
articles.description: NEW YORK, May 15 : Two of Wall Street's most closely watched billionaire stock pickers, both once voluble activist investors, took opposite tacks this year when Bill Ackman bet on Microsoft and exited Google parent Alphabet and Daniel Loeb did the opposite. Ackman said on X his firm Pershing Square began buil

articles.title: Kolkata housing market sees slight dip, appetitegrows for larger homes
articles.description: Kolkata: The city's housing market saw a mild slowdown in April 2026, but residential registrations remained the second-highest for the month in the l.

articles.title: Dow Jones, S&P 500 and Nasdaq end this week lower as tech stocks slide, Treasury yields and oil prices climb after Trump-Xi China summit disappoints investors - US stock market performance today May 15
articles.description: Dow Jones, S&P 500 and Nasdaq today: US stock markets faced a downturn as the Dow Jones, S&P 500, and Nasdaq closed lower, driven by a sell-off in tech stocks and climbing Treasury yields in the wake of a disappointing summit between President Trump and President Xi.

articles.title: Mcleod Russell accepts OTS of Rs 150 cr from JCF ARC
articles.description: Kolkata: As part of its restructuring, Mcleod Russell India has accepted a one-time settlement sanction of Rs 150 crore from JC Flowers Asset Reconstr.

articles.title: Tata Trusts call Charity Commissioner’s order ex-parte, says law can’t apply retrospectively
articles.description: Tata Trusts said amendment in the Maharashtra Public Trusts (Second) Amendment Act of 2025 is prospective in nature and does not affect the appointments of perpetual trustees made prior to its coming into force on September 1, 2025.

articles.title: SEC, Adanis move for consent judgments in Adani Green Bond issue
The environmental cost of AI
articles.description: AI data centres are driving sharp increases in electricity and water use, with cooling systems and chip density pushing demand higher across global infrastructure and India's fast growing digital economy.

articles.title: Fidelity Data Breach Settlement: Who Qualifies for a Payout and How to Claim It
articles.description: Fidelity Investments has agreed to pay $2.5 million to settle claims over a 2024 data breach that hit roughly 77,000 customers. If you got a notice from Fidelity about your account being compromised, you may have until July 27 to file a claim and get some money back.

articles.title: Uttarakhand hikes wages, vows action against labour law violators
articles.description: The Uttarakhand government has assured strict action against labour law violators and dismissed rumours of a Rs 20,000 minimum wage. The revised wage for unskilled non-engineering workers is Rs 13,018, now higher than in neighbouring states.

articles.title: CCPA fines two coaching institutes Rs 15 lakh for misleading ads
articles.description: CCPA fines Motion Education Pvt. Ltd. (Rs 10 lakh) and Career Line Coaching (Rs 5 lakh) for misleading ads. The institutes falsely claimed toppers from their paid programmes, concealing they were from free or test series courses.

articles.title: We transformed UP from ‘Prashn Pradesh’ into a growth engine: Yogi
articles.description: We transformed UP from ‘Prashn Pradesh’ into a growth engine: Yogi

articles.title: BJP functionaries use bike, cycle to reach office
articles.description: BJP leaders in Prayagraj commute by bike, cycle and public transport after PM Modi’s call to cut petrol and diesel use, promote health and conserve environment.

articles.title: Multi-asset funds reduce gold and silver exposure as prices soar
articles.description: The average gold and silver holding of multi-asset funds, which stood at 17 per cent in March 2025, was down to 13 per cent in April 2026

articles.title: Fuel prices rise over Rs 3 in Raj amid supply concerns
articles.description: Petrol and diesel prices in Jaipur rise over Rs 3/litre amid Gulf tensions; dealers warn of reduced allocations, shortages and possible crowding at pumps.

articles.title: Raj govt plans fuel-saving measures after PM Modi’s appeal, GRAM -2026 postponed
articles.description: In A Symbolic Move, Sharma Has Decided To Reduce Size Of His Convoy

articles.title: ‘Can I ask you a quick question?’: Kennedy chimes in during Sen. Warren's crypto amendment debate
articles.description: A tense moment unfolded during the Senate Banking Committee’s debate on the landmark CLARITY Act as John Kennedy politely interrupted Elizabeth Warren’s crypto amendment push with a simple: “Can I ask you a quick question?” The exchange came amid a heated battle over Warren’s proposal to allow sanctions on crypto platforms tied to illicit finance and national security risks.

articles.title: Brokers' stake in NSE at its lowest in a decade ahead of listing
articles.description: Shareholding of trading members and associates lowest in over a decade

articles.title: Auto, cab unions demand fare revision after fuel price hike
articles.description: Confusion And Shock At Pumps As Many Commuters, Cabbies, Auto Drivers Unaware Of Rise

articles.title: Fix last-mile walk before asking Delhiites to ditch cars, say experts
articles.description: Delhi’s experts say last-mile walkability must improve before urging residents to ditch cars; audits show 44% roads lack footpaths and 649 pedestrian deaths.

articles.title: Man killed as DTC bus hits him near Dhaula Kuan, driver flees
articles.description: Dhaula Kuan hit-and-run: 40-year-old Vijay Singh killed after speeding DTC bus hit him near metro exit; driver fled. Police scan CCTV to trace bus.

articles.title: Meet Abhay, your new shield against ‘digital arrest’
articles.description: CBI launches Abhay, an AI helpbot on cbi.gov.in to verify CBI notices in real time, helping citizens spot fake “digital arrest” scams and cyber fraud.
